title: "Bare Metals" New Age(development temp. paused)
description: A Texture Pack that brings the Bare Bones artstyle to Create New Age mod
body:
A Texture Pack that brings the Bare Bones artstyle to Create New Age mod 
(Not Finished, a lot of items and blocks not textured, still in alpha) 
i am just a student so do not hope that it is finished in near future, but i am dedicateing as much time to it as possible :D <3 

# Development temporarily paused bc. of examn period

hit me up over on discord "faux.dev" if you want to submit textures for this project
